entities.name: MOTH BEAN
entities.description: An underutilized, protein-rich legume grown in arid and semiarid areas of south Asia, highly resistant to abiotic stresses

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: The geographical region where moth bean is primarily grown

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental stressors such as heat and drought that moth bean is resistant to

entities.name: HEAT
entities.description: A specific abiotic stressor that moth bean is resistant to

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A specific abiotic stressor that moth bean is resistant to

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species or population

entities.name: TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying the genomic regions associated with specific traits

entities.name: SNP MARKER
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms used for genetic discovery and association mapping

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to link genetic markers to specific phenotypic traits

entities.name: FLOWERING TRAIT
entities.description: The phenotypic characteristic related to the timing of flowering in moth bean

entities.name: GENOTYPING BY SEQUENCING
entities.description: A GBS approach used to discover SNPs and analyze genetic diversity

entities.name: MODEL-BASED STRUCTURE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to group accessions into subpopulations based on genetic data

entities.name: PCA
entities.description: Principal Component Analysis used to group moth bean accessions into subpopulations

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to reveal variability and identify the center of diversity

entities.name: NORTHWESTERN REGION OF INDIA
entities.description: The region identified as the center of diversity for moth bean

entities.name: AMOVA
entities.description: Analysis of Molecular Variance used to reveal genetic variations within and among populations

entities.name: MULTI-LOCUS MODELS
entities.description: Statistical models including mrMLM, FASTmrEMMA, ISIS EM-BLASSO, MLMM, BLINK, and FarmCPU used for marker-trait association

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The specific measurement used to quantify the flowering trait

entities.name: GENOMIC REGIONS
entities.description: Potential areas of the genome associated with the flowering trait

entities.name: VIGNA SPECIES
entities.description: The genus of plants to which moth bean and mung bean belong

entities.name: VIGNA MUNGO
entities.description: A species of Vigna closely related to moth bean

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Agricultural programs aimed at developing improved crop varieties

entities.name: EARLY-MATURITY
entities.description: A desired trait for moth bean varieties to be developed in breeding programs
